text:
ETERNO RÉCIT (エテルノレシ, Eteruno Reshi) is a jewelry brand that collaborates with popular anime and game franchises. For each collaboration, they create specially designed products.

Information

The first collaboration merchandise was released in February, 2019. The second was released in March, 2020. The third was released in January, 2023.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Kurapika
Leorio Paradinight
Hisoka Morow
Chrollo Lucilfer
Feitan Portor
Shalnark
Illumi Zoldyck
Kite
Isaac Netero
Meruem
